_meta.description: Cloned brand voices for Qwen3-TTS Base model. Each entry maps a stable voice_id to a reference audio clip + transcript. The Base model extracts a speaker embedding from (ref_audio, ref_text) at startup and caches it, so every /tts call with this voice_id reproduces the SAME voice. This is real voice cloning — not generative VoiceDesign.

requirements.ref_audio: WAV or MP3, 24kHz preferred, 20-60s clean speech, single speaker, minimal background noise
requirements.ref_text: VERBATIM transcript of ref_audio (Qwen3-TTS requires this for cloning)
requirements.embedding_cache: Extracted at container startup via inference.create_voice_clone_prompt(); no re-extraction per request

_meta.note: Replace proof-of-concept entries (ref_audio pointing at generated samples) with real actor recordings before production.

brand_narrator_ng_male.name: Brand Narrator — Nigerian Male (Lagos)
brand_narrator_ng_male.ref_text: Welcome to our story. Today we share something special with you, from our hearts to yours, across the beautiful landscapes of Nigeria.

brand_narrator_gh_female.name: Brand Narrator — Ghanaian Female (Accra)
brand_narrator_gh_female.ref_text: Akwaaba. Welcome to our world of stories, where every voice carries the rhythm of Ghana and the warmth of our people.

brand_narrator_ke_male.name: Brand Narrator — Kenyan Male (Nairobi)
brand_narrator_ke_male.ref_text: Habari. Welcome to our stories from the heart of Nairobi, where every word carries the spirit of Kenya.
